allow: PowerShell(Import-Csv "c:\\Coding\\LOTR-Extractor\\nodes.csv" | Where-Object { $_.Node_type -eq "EVENT" } | Select-Object Label, Reference_Count | Sort-Object { [int]$_.Reference_Count } -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Import-Csv "c:\\Coding\\LOTR-Extractor\\nodes.csv" | Where-Object { $_.Node_type -eq "ORGANIZATION" } | Select-Object Label, Reference_Count | Sort-Object { [int]$_.Reference_Count } -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Import-Csv "c:\\Coding\\LOTR-Extractor\\nodes.csv" | Where-Object { $_.Label -match "^[Tt]he " -or $_.Label -match "^[Aa]n? " -or $_.Label -match "_" } | Select-Object Label, Node_type, Reference_Count | Sort-Object Node_type, Label | Format-Table -AutoSize)
